name: Polyline2DUtil
summary: Implemtation of the utilities for Polyline2D

methods.name: AlignSegmentsToBaseSegment
methods.signature: AlignSegmentsToBaseSegment( dimensionLine: Polyline2D, indexBaseSegment: int = 1 ) -> bool
methods.summary: Align the points of the dimension line
methods.remarks: Align the points of the dimension line

returns.doc: true, if all points are aligned

methods.name: AppendToPolyline2D( polyline: Polyline2D, append: Line2D ) -> tuple[bool, Polyline2D, bool, bool]
methods.signature: AppendToPolyline2D( polyline: Polyline2D, append: Line2D ) -> tuple[bool, Polyline2D, bool, bool]
methods.summary: Appends a line to a polyline the way that the line is always appended at the end
methods.remarks: Appends a line to a polyline the way that the line is always appended at the end

returns.doc: tuple(True if successful, false if line is not valid or is not connected to polyline, Resulting polyline, Returns if function has to swap the polyline point order, Returns is function has to swap the appended line/polyline point order)

methods.name: AppendToPolyline2D( polyline: Polyline2D, append: Polyline2D ) -> tuple[bool, Polyline2D, bool, bool]
methods.signature: AppendToPolyline2D( polyline: Polyline2D, append: Polyline2D ) -> tuple[bool, Polyline2D, bool, bool]
methods.summary: Appends a line to a polyline the way that the line is always appended at the end
methods.remarks: Appends a line to a polyline the way that the line is always appended at the end

returns.doc: tuple(True if successful, false if line is not valid or is not connected to polyline, Resulting polyline, Returns if function has to swap the polyline point order, Returns is function has to swap the appended line/polyline point order)

methods.name: CreatePolyline2D
methods.signature: CreatePolyline2D( startPnt: Point2D, endPnt: Point2D, corners: int, diameter: float, systemAngle: float, bCenterPnt: bool, bClockwise: bool, ) -> tuple[Polyline2D, Point2D]

params.name: diameter
params.doc: Contains the diameter of the rectangle

params.name: systemAngle
params.doc: Angle of the window where the rectangle will be drawn

methods.name: GetOutlinePolylineSideFromPoint
methods.signature: GetOutlinePolylineSideFromPoint( polygon: Polygon2D, fromPoint: Point2D, directionPoint: Point2D, axis_object: object, ) -> tuple[int, Polyline2D]
methods.summary: Get the outline polygon side by a point
methods.remarks: Get the outline polygon side by a point

methods.name: GetPolyline2DSegment
methods.signature: GetPolyline2DSegment( polyline: Polyline2D, clickPoint: Point2D ) -> tuple[int, Line2D]
methods.summary: Get the closest segment for the given click point
methods.remarks: Get the closest segment for the given click point

returns.doc: tuple(Index of the end point of the clicked line, Segment of the polyline, where the click point is on)

methods.name: RemoveNonCorners
methods.summary: Normalize the polygon by removing points, which are no corners
methods.remarks: Normalize the polygon by removing points, which are no corners

params.name: outline
params.doc: Closed polygon outline of a wall
